location_precision.why: Every finding carries a usable file:line (e.g. 'src/sync.py:14', 'src/report.py:11').

interaction_synthesis.why: Each finding is treated in isolation; no compound failure mode combining two separate defects is explained mechanistically.

causal_clarity.why: Every finding states the failure mechanism, e.g. 'floor division, so the final partial page is never fetched' and 'raises AttributeError when email is None ... and IndexError on any email lacking an @'.

location_precision.why: Every one of the six findings carries a usable file:line (e.g. 'src/sync.py:14', 'src/report.py:11').
